text:
Peek (lit. , rom. Sutīru) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to view all the free slots of one target player that they have previously encountered during the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows a player to view all of the free card slots in another player's binder. It only works on a single target player who has already been met. After use, the card is then destroyed. Much like "Fluoroscopy", this card can be placed into the binder to view the owner's list of contacts without consuming it.

|-
![Eng]
|No.1001 :: Steal 
You can view all the "Free Slots" of 1 other named player. (You have previously met.)
|}

Trivia

"Peek" is the first Greed Island card to be shown. It was used in Chapter 128 by Latarza to find out Gon's and Killua's names and check the latter's free slots.
In Chapter 172, the Bombers use this card to find out if any of their victims has met Tsezguerra, revealing that, like "Fluoroscopy", a single card can be used to view a contact list indefinitely.
The card's first appearance in the Hunter × Hunter 1999 series is Episode 74.
The card's first appearance in the Hunter × Hunter 2011 remake is Episode 61.
